summary: Minimal, well-scoped CLI change adding report-selection flags (-B/--bgwriter, -L/--replslots, -J/--io) plus the statements_jit subcase (-X j). Implementation matches the existing flag/switch style exactly, all returned report-type strings are valid keys in internal/view/view.go New() and report/report.go describeReport, and tests cover all five valid forms plus invalid -J/-X paths. Tests pass and gofmt/go vet are clean.

suggestions.suggestion: The -J (showStatIO) case is placed between showReplSlots and showProcPidStat, while the other string sub-selectors (showDatabases, showStatements, showProgress) are grouped together later in the switch. Grouping the string sub-selector cases together (or at least keeping -J next to the other string-valued flags) would marginally improve readability. The current placement keeps it next to the related bgwriter/replslots family, which is also a defensible choice per the task hints, so this is purely cosmetic.
suggestions.benefit: Slightly more consistent grouping of string-valued sub-selectors in the switch.
